process_registry.docstring_head: browser_executor.py — Friday entry for the BrowserUse arm

ttlg.scout: Friday-level wrapper around execution_arm.execute. Two paths: in-process import → AZ HTTP fallback.
ttlg.thinker: Replaces prior direct BrowserUseNode call. Fallback chain preserved and widened.
ttlg.gate_reason: Backward-compatible; mode_hint extended; selection metadata forwarded.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: dispatcher emits normalized result with arm + mode + selection.

process_registry.docstring_head: computeruse_executor.py — Friday entry for the ComputerUse arm

ttlg.scout: Friday-level wrapper around execution_arm.execute (computer_use path). Preserves computeruse_approved gate before dispatch.
ttlg.thinker: Approval gate + deletion gate layered correctly. No silent execution path.
ttlg.gate_reason: Two-layer approval (executor level + arm-level deletion gate) satisfies constitutional 'no bypass' clause.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: unapproved → escalated; approved → dispatched through arm.

ttlg.scout: Package entrypoint; exports execute, select, guard, health, arm classes.
ttlg.thinker: No overlap; cleanly exports the four-variant arm surface. New capability, no regression.
ttlg.gate_reason: Conforms to Article XVI §3; governance watermarked; public API stable.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: exports exactly the symbols declared in README.

ttlg.scout: BrowserUse arm — both modes. Inputs: task, mode, max_steps, context. Outputs: ArmResult. Dependencies: browser-use, Playwright/Chromium, optional Xvfb for headed. Failure modes: import-guarded; headed→headless fallback on no display.
ttlg.thinker: Replaces legacy hardcoded-headless browser_use_node (still importable for back-compat). No silent regressions.
ttlg.gate_reason: Two modes exposed, graceful degradation, governance-watermarked, logs per-run.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: 2/2 modes operational; fallback annotated in receipts.

process_registry.docstring_head: callable.py — Universal Entrypoint for the Execution Arm

ttlg.scout: Universal entrypoint. execute() + execute_async() + health() + install_event_bus_handler(). Inputs: task, mode_hint, max_steps, context. Outputs: dict result with 'selection' attached.
ttlg.thinker: Bridges in-process, event-bus, and REST (via AZ bridge). 'Callable by any component' (Sovereign directive) satisfied.
ttlg.gate_reason: Three surfaces unified behind one core; thread-safe singleton arms.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: three call surfaces verified by structural dry-run.

ttlg.scout: ComputerUse arm — tool loop (computer + bash + str_replace_editor). Inputs: task, mode, max_turns, context. Outputs: ArmResult. Dependencies: anthropic SDK, xdotool, scrot, Xvfb. Failure modes: missing deps → 'unavailable' health; destructive bash triggers deletion gate.
ttlg.thinker: Net-new capability. Bash heuristic catches destructive patterns (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, docker rm...). No overlap with BrowserUse.
ttlg.gate_reason: Article XVI §3 satisfied; deletion gate integrated; bash destructive-heuristic present.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: four tool handlers (bash, str_replace_editor, computer, screenshot) implemented; deletion gate wired.

ttlg.scout: Deletion approval guard. Inputs: target + context. Outputs: GuardResult + log entry. Dependency: filesystem. Failure modes: log path unwritable (swallowed).
ttlg.thinker: Net-new capability enforcing 'Deletion only upon approval' (Sovereign directive). No overlap.
ttlg.gate_reason: Hard-rule compliance; logs every attempt; raises DeletionRefused on denial.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: enforces the Sovereign hard-rule verbatim.

process_registry.docstring_head: mode_selector.py — Reasoning Router for the Four Execution Variants

ttlg.scout: Reasoning router. Inputs: task + context + mode_hint. Outputs: Selection (arm, mode, reason, confidence). Dependency: none beyond stdlib. Failure modes: defaults safely to browser_use.headless.
ttlg.thinker: Deterministic, testable reasoner. Overlap with: nothing. Risk: rule drift as task vocabulary evolves; mitigated by explicit override paths.
ttlg.gate_reason: Article XVI §3 'reasoning that determines when each is necessary' fully satisfied.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: confidence field + explicit overrides + safe default all present.
